items.title: MP Materials (MP) Announces US$275 Million Revolving Credit Facility With JPMorgan Chase
items.description: MP Materials (MP) announced a $275 million revolving credit facility with JPMorgan Chase in August, aiming to enhance operational flexibility. Despite reporting a reduced net loss for Q2 2025 compared to last year, sales saw significant growth, shining a positive light on its earnings announcement. The company's performance in the market, with a 145% price move over the last quarter, aligns well with recent market trends where indices like the S&P 500 hit record highs. Strengthened...

items.title: 5 Relatively Secure And Cheap Dividend Stocks, Yields Up To 9% (Sept. 2025)
items.description: We go over a filtering process to select just 5 conservative dividend-growth stocks from more than 7,500 companies. Read here for picks from our monthly series.
